# Technical Implementation Plan Template

Use this artifact after PRD and JTBD / User Stories are clear, and before sprint execution starts.

## Purpose
- Translate approved product scope into an implementation approach.
- Make technical handoffs explicit for Mason before sprint execution.
- Keep the document lightweight and practical.
